name: Vallei van Sluiers
overview: A South African, Afrikaans-language television drama series which revolves around three well-known Boland fruit farming families - the De Bruyns, the Roberts' and the Van Rhijns - and the people who are drawn into their disasters, quarrels and scandals.

trailers.title: Vallei van Sluiers reeks 3: Begin 15 April 2014 om 2014
